summary: Completed realtime auction sync and dashboard enhancements: backend getUserBids now returns correct market price, auctionId, userHighestBid, paymentStatus, and includes ended deposit sessions; getWonItems detects time-ended auctions. Frontend adds AuctionResultBanner for winner + final price when auction ends (auction-room and product detail pages), uses liveState for price/timer instead of stale product data, and enhances dashboard with active vs ended participation tables, won-items payment banner, total spent from paid wins, and 5s polling.
current_status: Bid step + realtime price/timer + winner screen + detailed user dashboard implemented. Backend compiles successfully. User should restart backend from IDE and refresh frontend to test: user1 bids should update price/timer for user2 without reload; when timer hits zero winner banner appears; dashboard shows participated/won sessions with payment status.
